title: pelargonium × percyanum
intro: Pelargonium × percyanum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and ornamental leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of geraniol and linalool compounds. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce menstrual cramps and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
